nasb.text: There shall not be found among you anyone who makes his son or his daughter pass through the fire, one who uses divination, one who practices witchcraft, or one who interprets omens, or a sorcerer,

esv.text: There shall not be found among you anyone who burns his son or his daughter as an offering, anyone who practices divination or tells fortunes or interprets omens, or a sorcerer

cnv.text: 在你中間不可有人把自己的兒女獻作火祭，也不可有占卜的、算命的、用法術的、行邪術的、

ccb.text: 你们当中不可有人焚烧自己的子女作祭物，不可有人占卜、算命、作法、行邪术、
